query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ocr_raw_text IS NULL OR ocr_raw_text = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_ocr_data,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ocr_raw_text IS NOT NULL AND ocr_raw_text != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ocr_data
FROM line_receipts 
WHERE status = 'pending';
